exercises.name: Standing dumbbell shoulder press (5 kg each)
Kettlebell Russian swing (8 kg, no overhead)
Light kettlebell farmer’s walk (8 kg each)
Modified side plank (knees) – 30 sec each side
Kettlebell floor press (8 kg each hand)
Wall‑supported side plank (knees) – 30 sec each side

derived.allHealthConditions: postpartum deconditioning, mild diastasis history now cleared for exercise
derived.allInjuries: wrist sensitivity, avoid long loaded planks on hands
derived.allGoals: rebuild strength and lose fat gradually, short home sessions while caring for baby
derived.experienceInfo: beginner - resistance bands and one kettlebell at home
